_metadata.description: Primary source URLs for ETF factsheets and identifiers
_metadata.usage: Used by build_factsheet_fixtures.py to download official documents
_metadata.important: ALL URLs and data must come from official issuer sources - NO FABRICATION

how_to_populate: 1. Visit issuer website for each ETF
2. Navigate to product page for the specific fund
4. Copy the URL for the latest factsheet PDF
6. Do NOT make up URLs - use TODO_MANUAL_RESEARCH_REQUIRED if unknown
verification_checklist: URL points directly to PDF (not HTML redirect page)
URL is from official issuer domain
Factsheet contains: ISIN/CUSIP, domicile, share class, TER, as-of date
